reasoning: Matching cabinetry color to the wall color (Alabaster SW 7008) in a tonal, monochromatic approach ties the room together cohesively against the warm Brittanicca Warm counters and unlacquered brass hardware — a combination that reads warm and timeless for a young family without leaning trendy; satin sheen is retained from the existing cabinetry spec for durability and washability.
